title: Enchantment Descriptions Java
description: This resource pack enhances Minecraft’s enchantment system by providing detailed descriptions of every enchantment directly in-game. Whether you're new or experienced, it helps you make better choices while enchanting your gear.
body: # Enchantment Descriptions A simple but powerful resource pack that adds **detailed enchantment descriptions** to tooltips in Minecraft Java Edition. No more guessing what each enchantment does—this pack shows you all relevant information directly in-game. --- ### 🎨 Screenshots ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbdb907c5a303a699c0b438ed9383140a2d12606.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d61a665b31bd03d773eed6a07e90f36c3bb88c.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e2c5c32694d5a9867deaef831748ff320c8284.png) ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f71ba9845e84a18d52580f2e958c52a40ce2337.png) ![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25c18f8ac272728632aa1b3bfd9b8a87797491c2.png) ## Installation (Resource Pack - .zip) 1. Download the `.zip` file. 2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder. 3. Launch Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → Enable the pack. 4. ## Installation (Mod Version - .jar) To install the `.jar` version of Enchantment Descriptions: 1. Make sure you have **Minecraft Forge** or **Fabric** installed. 2. Download the latest `.jar` file from the Files section. 3. Place the `.jar` file into your `mods/` folder, located in: - Windows: `%appdata%\.minecraft\mods` - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods` - Linux: `~/.minecraft/mods` 4. Launch Minecraft using the appropriate mod loader. 5. Enjoy detailed enchantment tooltips in-game! --- > This is a **client-side visual aid only** — it does not affect gameplay or servers. --- > Report if you find any mistranslation or bug
